text:
is a book published by Kadokawa Shoten on 27 February 1997.

Overview

Asuka always treats others with an aggressive attitude. But behind those words, there was a delicate heart that hated loneliness. This book is a collection of photo poems written by voice actress Yuko Miyamura about the world of "Neon Genesis Evangelion". https://www.amazon.co.jp/%E5%AE%AE%E6%9D%91-%E5%84%AA%E5%AD%90-ebook/dp/B0CB7H74LY/
